description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] Linear GraphQL API via a personal API key — read your assigned issues, search issues, browse teams and projects, and add comments. All tools POST a fixed GraphQL operation to /graphql; pass variables to parameterize.

credentialFields.name: apiKey
credentialFields.label: Personal API Key
credentialFields.description: Create at https://linear.app/settings/account/security (Personal API keys). Linear expects the raw key in the Authorization header WITHOUT a 'Bearer ' prefix — this manifest sends it as 'Authorization: <key>'.

tools.name: linear_viewer
tools.description: Get the authenticated user (viewer): id, name, email, active teams. GraphQL 'viewer' query.

params.name: query
params.default: query Viewer { viewer { id name email displayName teams(first: 50) { nodes { id key name } } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

tools.name: linear_my_issues
tools.description: List issues assigned to you (the viewer), most recently updated first. GraphQL 'viewer.assignedIssues' query.

params.name: query
params.default: query MyIssues($first: Int = 25, $filter: IssueFilter) { viewer { assignedIssues(first: $first, filter: $filter, orderBy: updatedAt) { nodes { id identifier title priority url updatedAt state { name type } team { key name } } } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

params.name: variables
params.description: Optional: { first: number, filter: IssueFilter } e.g. { "filter": { "state": { "type": { "eq": "started" } } } }.

tools.name: linear_search_issues
tools.description: Full-text search issues by a query string. GraphQL 'searchIssues' connection.

params.name: query
params.default: query SearchIssues($term: String!, $first: Int = 25) { searchIssues(term: $term, first: $first) { nodes { id identifier title url priority updatedAt state { name type } assignee { name } team { key name } } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

params.name: variables
params.description: { term: string (required search text), first?: number }.

tools.name: linear_get_issue
tools.description: Get a single issue by its id or identifier (e.g. ENG-123). GraphQL 'issue' query.

params.name: query
params.default: query GetIssue($id: String!) { issue(id: $id) { id identifier title description priority url createdAt updatedAt state { name type } assignee { name email } team { key name } labels { nodes { name } } comments { nodes { body user { name } createdAt } } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

params.name: variables
params.description: { id: string } — issue UUID or identifier like 'ENG-123'.

tools.name: linear_list_teams
tools.description: List teams in the workspace. GraphQL 'teams' query.

params.name: query
params.default: query Teams($first: Int = 50) { teams(first: $first) { nodes { id key name description issueCount } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

tools.name: linear_list_projects
tools.description: List projects in the workspace. GraphQL 'projects' query.

params.name: query
params.default: query Projects($first: Int = 50) { projects(first: $first) { nodes { id name description state progress url startDate targetDate lead { name } } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

tools.name: linear_list_team_issues
tools.description: List issues for a specific team by team id. GraphQL 'team.issues' query.

params.name: query
params.default: query TeamIssues($teamId: String!, $first: Int = 25) { team(id: $teamId) { id key name issues(first: $first, orderBy: updatedAt) { nodes { id identifier title priority url updatedAt state { name type } assignee { name } } } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL query — do not change.

params.name: variables
params.description: { teamId: string (team UUID from linear_list_teams), first?: number }.

tools.name: linear_create_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue. GraphQL 'commentCreate' mutation.

params.name: query
params.default: mutation CreateComment($input: CommentCreateInput!) { commentCreate(input: $input) { success comment { id body url createdAt } } }
params.description: Fixed GraphQL mutation — do not change.
